mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.contract_name, t0.contract_code, t0.contract_type, t0.contract_money, t0.signing_date, t0.start_date, t0.end_date, t0.contract_abstract, t0.agent_way, t0.law_firm_id, t0.agency_fee_ratio, t0.follow_up, t0.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT lfi.name as lawFirmName, ci.contract_name as contractName, ci.end_date as endDate,ci.id,ci.follow_up FROM contract_info ci INNER JOIN law_firm_info lfi ON ci.law_firm_id = lfi.id AND lfi.is_deleted = 0 AND lfi.enabled = 1 WHERE ci.is_deleted = 0 AND DATEDIFF(ci.end_date, NOW()) = 90;
